title_en: ChatGPT Pro $100 Plan Launches with 5X Usage Limits
summary_en: OpenAI introduces new mid-tier ChatGPT Pro subscription at $100/month with 5X usage limits for Codex. Targets developers seeking more capacity between Plus and Enterprise tiers.

title_en: Meta Launches Muse Spark: New Proprietary AI Model
summary_en: Meta abandons open-source approach with Muse Spark, its first proprietary AI model. App climbs to #5 on App Store, marking major shift from Llama strategy.

title_en: LLM Traffic Converts 30-40% Higher Than Traditional Sources
summary_en: AI-referred traffic shows dramatically higher conversion rates than search traffic. Most enterprises aren't optimizing for answer engine optimization yet, creating opportunity.

title_en: Claude Mythos Autonomously Exploits 27-Year-Old Security Bug
summary_en: Anthropic's Claude Mythos discovered critical vulnerability in OpenBSD for under $50. Demonstrates AI's potential for autonomous security testing and bug bounty programs.

summary_en: TurboTax team built AI workflow to implement 900-page tax code changes in hours instead of months. Template applicable to any regulated industry team.
